title: Pandas Modpack
description: A vanilla enhanced modpack | 1.20.1 | Includes Shaders and Distant Horizons
body:
![Panda's Modpack Vanilla Enhanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b42caebd9eb6d3760e029eaaa1d454f4e5f116d.png)
## About
**Panda's Modpack** aims to enhance vanilla Minecraft to expand upon options in gear progression, exploration in all dimensions, base building, and more. This modpack was built in mind to not take away nor add too much to the classic survival experience for both singleplayer and multiplayer in mind.

## Features
- **Build to Your Heart's Conten 👷‍♂️**: Finally build with vertical slabs thanks to AutoSlabs. Furnish your home with Handcrafted and Paladin's Furniture Mod. A plethora of new blocks have also been added by all the other mods.
- **Improved World 🌎**: The Overworld, Nether, and End have been overhauled with Terralith, Promenade, Better Nether, and Better End to provide new landscapes to see, explore, and build in. Explore space with Ad Astra.
- **Mobs: New and Improved 🧟‍♂️**: Hybrid Aquatic and Friends&Foes add some new faces to the world while VillagersPlus and BetterDogs will enhance the vanilla experience with these familiar mobs.
- **More Gear and Tools At Your Disposal ⚔**: Automate farms and build factories with Create and its add-ons. Build various tools with Hephaestus. Get abilities through Mystic Charms.
- **Multiplayer Fun 👥**: Say hello to each other with Simple Voice Chat. Feel more immersed by seeing What Are They Up To or show off your fashion sense with Simple Hats.
- **New Dangers 🤺**: Face new dungeons and mobs with YUNG's dungeons, Deeper and Darker, AdventureZ, and more. Take on these challenges with gear present from other mods in the pack!
- **Performance 💻**: Improved optimization with Sodium as well as generation and culling help mods.
- **Quality of Life ⛱**: Know where you are with Xaero's Maps and improved inventory with REI. Expand your storage with Iron Chests and Tom's Simple Storage. Go on longer excursions with Sophisicated Backpacks. Save time breaking trees with FallingTree. Fast travel with Waystones, and don't fear losing your loot with Gravestones if you prefer keepInventory off. And there's more!
- **Visuals 👓**: Appreciate the beauty of Minecraft with preconfigured shader packs and Distant Horizons.
